title: Fundamental Concepts of Group Theory
description: A Venn diagram illustrating the hierarchical structure of algebraic objects, showing how a Group is defined by specific axioms and how other structures relate to it.
relationships: A Set with a binary operation is the foundation. A Semigroup requires Closure and Associativity. A Monoid adds an Identity Element. A Group further requires an Inverse Element. An Abelian Group is a Group that is also Commutative.
